arts.ttl: 'Something expected' of Aston Villa forward after breakthrough following transfer
arts.sum: Dobbin, who joined Villa in the summer transfer window from Everton, at a time when Tim Iroegbunam went in the other direction, was immediately loaned out upon arrival to West Bromwich Albion for the first half of this season, but the forward started only one of his 17 Championship appearances for the Baggies. Aston Villa winger Lewis Dobbin got his first 90 minutes of the season under his belt at the weekend as he came through a full match at new club Norwich City in their FA Cup defeat to Brighton and Hove Albion on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa could sanction unforeseen transfer decision with future uncertainty
arts.sum: Aston Villa could explore the possibility of bringing winger Samuel Iling-Junior back to the football club this month from his loan spell at Champions League outfit Bologna. It was a swift return to Italy, though, when Bologna emerged as suitors and, with their Champions League campaign in mind, they moved to beef up their squad with the loan addition of Iling-Junior, who came off the bench to score a last minute equaliser against Como on his debut.

arts.ttl: Monchi negotiating Aston Villa arrival – Working to beat Liverpool and Newcastle, keen to sell Diego Carlos first
arts.sum: Aston Villa, Liverpool and Newcastle United are all reportedly keen on Sevilla’s Loïc Badé in the winter market. Last weekend, AS reported Liverpool and Newcastle are ‘betting heavily’ on the defender. The Villans have started discussions with the La Liga side over a deal for him this month. Earlier today, Diario de Sevilla stated Aston Villa The post Monchi negotiating Aston Villa arrival – Working to beat Liverpool and Newcastle, keen to sell Diego Carlos first appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Everton could sign Ajax star for bargain price in January after major transfer admission
arts.sum: Devyne Rensch has been linked with a move to the Blues and could leave this month

arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.

arts.ttl: Everton handed new PSR verdict as rivals face nervous wait over points deduction
arts.sum: Everton and all Premier League clubs declared compliant on PSR for 2023/24 but Leicester City remain in legal dispute ver spending during 2022/23

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Wout Faes to leave Leicester, Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Woet Faes leaving Leicester City, Romain Esse to Crystal Palace and Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa face familiar transfer interest but are more powerful thanks to NSWE
arts.sum: Duran is back in contention when Villa take on Everton on Wednesday night, but away from the football pitch the speculation has begun to intensify again - that's despite the fact that the forward has since committed his future to the club in the form of a new long-term contract, sanctioned by owners Nassef Sawiris and Wes Edens, which runs until 2030. The will he, won't he saga which engulfed their transfer window eventually subsided with the Colombian staying put when Villa held firm in the face of interest from Chelsea and West Ham. Duran then appeared to offer apologies when netting the winner on the opening day.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this midweek's games
arts.sum: Alex Jack has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday.

arts.ttl: Everton agree major five-year deal to transform facilities at new stadium
arts.sum: OCS has been appointed as provider of facilities management at Everton Stadium
